info.title: Healthy Menu API
info.description: RESTful API for a healthy restaurant/menu backend. Includes public menu APIs and protected admin dashboard APIs.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of categories for the admin dashboard, including products_count when available.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search categories by name or description.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

post.description: Creates a new category. Category names must be unique.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

422.description: Validation failed. This can happen when the category name is missing or duplicated.

get.description: Returns a single category by id.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

put.description: Updates an existing category. Category names must be unique except for the current category.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

422.description: Validation failed. This can happen when the category name is missing or duplicated.

delete.description: Deletes a category only when it is not used by products. If products exist for this category, the API returns 409 CATEGORY.IN_USE.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

409.description: Category is in use by products and cannot be deleted.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of goals/tags for the admin dashboard, including products_count when available.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

post.description: Creates a new goal/tag. Goal names must be unique.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

422.description: Validation failed. This can happen when the goal name is missing or duplicated.

get.description: Returns a single goal/tag by id.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

put.description: Updates an existing goal/tag. Goal names must be unique except for the current goal.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

422.description: Validation failed. This can happen when the goal name is missing or duplicated.

delete.description: Deletes a goal/tag only when it is not used by products. If products use this goal, the API returns 409 GOAL.IN_USE.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

409.description: Goal is in use by products and cannot be deleted.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of ingredients for the admin dashboard, including products_count when available.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

post.description: Creates a new ingredient. Ingredient names must be unique.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

422.description: Validation failed. This can happen when the ingredient name is missing or duplicated.

get.description: Returns a single ingredient by id.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

put.description: Updates an existing ingredient. Ingredient names must be unique except for the current ingredient.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

422.description: Validation failed. This can happen when the ingredient name is missing or duplicated.

delete.description: Deletes an ingredient only when it is not used by products. If products use this ingredient, the API returns 409 INGREDIENT.IN_USE.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

409.description: Ingredient is in use by products and cannot be deleted.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of products for the admin dashboard with filtering, sorting, category, goals, ingredients, and image data.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search products by title, description, or ingredient name.

parameters.name: is_available
parameters.description: Filter by availability. Accepted values: true, false, 1, 0.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

post.description: Creates a product and syncs its ingredient and goal/tag relationships.

description.example: Grilled chicken with brown rice, broccoli, and avocado.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

get.description: Returns a single product by id with category, ingredients, goals/tags, and image data.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

put.description: Updates an existing product and syncs its ingredient and goal/tag relationships. This endpoint follows full PUT behavior.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

delete.description: Deletes a product and removes its physical product image folder from storage.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

post.description: Authenticates an admin user and returns a Sanctum Bearer token. Public registration is not supported.
Revokes the current authenticated Sanctum access token.
Uploads a single image for a product. If the product already has an image, the old image is replaced. Allowed file types: jpg, jpeg, png, webp. Maximum size: 5 MB. SVG is not allowed.

image.description: Product image file. Allowed: jpg, jpeg, png, webp. Max size: 5 MB.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

422.description: Validation failed. This can happen when the image is missing, too large, or has an unsupported file type.

delete.description: Deletes the current image for a product and removes the physical file from storage.

403.description: Forbidden. Authenticated user is not an admin.

404.description: Product or product image not found.

get.description: Returns all menu categories used by the public menu filters.
Returns all goals/tags used by the public menu filters and product cards.
Returns all ingredients used by product details and public filtering/search support.
Returns paginated public product cards with category, goals, nutrition, availability, and single product image.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by product title, description, or ingredient name.

parameters.name: is_available
parameters.description: Filter by availability. Accepted values: true, false, 1, 0.

get.description: Returns full product details for the product details modal.

description.example: Healthy protein bowls with balanced macros.

short_description.example: Grilled chicken breast with rice, broccoli, avocado...

description.example: Grilled chicken breast with rice, broccoli, avocado, and light fitness sauce.

sanctum.description: Use Laravel Sanctum Bearer token. Example: Authorization: Bearer {token}

tags.name: Public Menu
tags.description: Public read-only menu endpoints used by the customer-facing UI.
